explanations.pt-br: Imports: TypedDict para tipagem, ChromaDB, SentenceTransformer e Transformers.
explanations.en-us: Imports: TypedDict for typing, ChromaDB, SentenceTransformer, and Transformers.

explanations.pt-br: RAGResult: tipo estruturado com resposta, fontes e score de relevância.
explanations.en-us: RAGResult: structured type with answer, sources, and relevance score.

explanations.pt-br: Três componentes: vector store (ChromaDB), embedder (SentenceTransformer), generator (LLM).
explanations.en-us: Three components: vector store (ChromaDB), embedder (SentenceTransformer), generator (LLM).

explanations.pt-br: INGEST: documentos são embeddados e indexados no vector store com IDs únicos.
explanations.en-us: INGEST: documents are embedded and indexed in the vector store with unique IDs.

explanations.pt-br: RETRIEVE: query é embeddada, busca por similaridade, contexto montado, LLM gera resposta fundamentada.
explanations.en-us: RETRIEVE: query is embedded, similarity search, context assembled, LLM generates grounded answer.
